scope: FQ-04: first combat gear slice — make sword and armor matter in live gameplay on top of the FQ-03 equipment foundation.
summary: Sword: sword_crude (weapon slot, effects.attack_damage 3) forged via the new craft_sword recipe (2 wood + 3 stone, town_hall). player.attack_damage() returns the equipped weapon's damage or 1 bare-handed and _try_hit_threat passes it to threat.take_hit — the existing mine-click combat path, now weapon-aware; a fresh 3 hp slime dies to one strike. Armor: helmet_crude/torso_crude/feet_crude (armor 1/2/1) forged as a set via craft_armor_set (6 wood + 4 stone, torso slot as the anchor guard). player.armor_total() sums the armor effect over ALL equipped items so future rings/amulets can add armor via data; take_damage applies flat mitigation with a minimum 1-health chip per landed hit (armor never grants immunity) and keeps non-positive amounts a no-op. Forge functions share a _consume_recipe_inputs helper and fit-check every piece before consuming stockpile, so a data regression cannot eat inputs without equipping (review fix). UI: two town-panel forge buttons with crafted-state refresh, toolbelt 'Weapon X · Armor N', and an 'Attack N · Armor N' summary in the equipment panel. I-frames, collapse, passive regen, ancestry health modifiers, enemy contact-damage scaling, and the FQ-03 persistence path are all unchanged; rings/amulet/accessory remain inert per queue scope.
acceptance: Sword can damage an enemy: one real hit-path strike kills a 3 hp slime (fq04_sword_damages_enemy); unarmed baseline attack 1, sword attack 3

Armor reduces incoming damage by a visible, data-defined amount: a 10-damage hit loses exactly 10 - armor_total() = 6 (fq04_armor_reduces_damage); minimum chip keeps a 2-damage hit at exactly 1 loss under 4 armor
Equipment effects save/load and do not break ancestry health modifiers: gear wiped then restored by load_game with max_health identical (fq04_gear_round_trips_ancestry_intact)
Forging consumes stockpile, cannot repeat, and equips through player.equip_item (fq04_forge_sword_equips, fq04_forge_armor_equips_set)
Weapon/armor state visible: toolbelt line and equipment panel show Attack 3 / Armor 4 and item names (fq04_ui_shows_weapon_and_armor)
Smoke 157/157 (was 149) on windowed Godot 4.6.1; validator PASS incl. combat items/recipes; capsule doctor healthy; git diff --check clean
No unrelated feature work: no swing arc, no drag/drop, rings/amulet/accessory inert
validation: python scripts/validate_repo.py -> PASS incl. FQ-04 combat item/recipe checks
COHERONIA_SMOKE=1 waited windowed run -> 157/157 PASS incl. eight fq04_* checks; fresh results file verified by LastWriteTime
decisions: Melee reuses the existing mine-click hit path (_try_hit_threat) made weapon-aware, rather than adding a separate attack action — FQ-08/FQ-13 build combat depth later
Armor is flat mitigation summed over all equipped items with a minimum 1-health chip, keeping the math legible and data-driven; percent mitigation deferred
The armor set forges as one craft (torso as anchor guard) to keep the town panel small; per-piece crafting can arrive with the FQ-09 visual panels
Forge functions fit-check gear before consuming inputs (review fix) so partial equips with spent stockpile are impossible
take_damage keeps non-positive amounts a no-op (review fix), preserving the pre-FQ-04 caller contract
Orchestration: Explore recon -> orchestrator implementation (157/157 first run) -> sonnet review (no must-fix; 2 should-fix + 2 nits applied, 2 nits accepted) -> full re-verification green
risks: Combat feel (sword 3, armor 4 vs slime contact 8) untested by human play; all numbers data-tunable
No unequip flow for forged gear in play; equip/unequip UI interaction is future work
update_inventory performs three equipped_dict() normalize passes per refresh — negligible at 12 slots, cache if item counts grow
next_action: FQ-05: Mana or Attunement system MVP.
